channel.title: OptiScale Advisors Blog
channel.description: AI SEO insights and strategies from OptiScale Advisors

item.title: AI Content Optimization Strategies: 7 Proven Techniques to Rank Higher in 2025
item.description: Discover advanced AI content optimization strategies that top-ranking websites use. Learn how to leverage artificial intelligence for semantic SEO, content scoring, and Google's E-E-A-T requirements.
item.author: info@optiscaleadvisors.com (Sarah Mitchell)

item.title: How to Track If ChatGPT and Perplexity Mention Your Business (Best Tools 2026)
item.description: Want to know if AI recommends your business? Here are the best tools to track your ChatGPT and Perplexity visibility in 2026, from free to enterprise, with pricing.
item.author: vinod@optiscaleadvisors.com (Vinod Kumar)

item.title: AI SEO Complete Guide 2025: How Artificial Intelligence is Revolutionizing Search Optimization
item.description: Master AI-powered SEO strategies to dominate search rankings in 2025. Learn how artificial intelligence, machine learning, and automation are transforming SEO, with actionable tactics used by top-ranking websites.
item.author: info@optiscaleadvisors.com (OptiScale 360 Team)

item.title: How to Make Your Website Show Up on ChatGPT and Perplexity (2026 Checklist)
item.description: A step-by-step checklist to make ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI find and recommend your business. The exact fixes we use in our AI visibility audits.
item.author: vinod@optiscaleadvisors.com (Vinod Kumar)
